title: EPOSGEAR Candy Stripe Plastic Vest Carrier Shopping Bags (Medium - 10" x 15" x 18", Red/Blue Mix, 200)
features: Candy Striped bags suitable for use in many retail environments.
These carrier bags are available in Blue or Red as shown in the images therefore the colour you receive may vary
Approximate Bag Dimensions: Length (ex handles) 330mm. Length (inc handles) 435mm. Width - 250mm.
Please note that the carrier bags have a maximum carry weight of approximately 4.5 kg
These bags are packed in 100s, pack contains approximately 200 carrier bags
description: Candy Striped bags suitable for use in many retail environments.
